headline: Peter Thiel warned real estate ‘catastrophe’ will deal massive blow to young Americans. Is his prediction coming true?
summary: “The basic Georgist obsession was real estate, and it was if you weren’t really careful, you would get runaway real estate prices, and the people who owned the real estate would make all the gains in a society.”
